flows.title: Customer browses products and views details
flows.trigger: Customer lands on homepage or navigates to category page
steps: Customer views hero carousel with promotional banners
Customer browses featured products on homepage or navigates to category page
Customer clicks product card to view product detail page
System displays product with images, description, price, and variant options
Customer selects variant (if applicable) and adds to cart
flows.outcome: Product is added to cart, cart drawer shows updated contents

flows.title: Customer registers account
flows.trigger: Customer clicks 'Register' from navigation or is prompted at checkout
steps: Customer fills registration form with email, password, and name
System validates input and checks for existing email
System sends OTP to email for verification
Customer enters OTP code
System creates account and logs user in

flows.title: Customer places order with Midtrans payment
flows.trigger: Customer proceeds to checkout from cart
steps: Customer reviews cart contents andProceeds to checkout
Customer enters or selects shipping address
System calculates shipping, tax, and applies any promo code
Customer confirms order and initiates payment
System creates order atomically (order + items + payment record)
System redirects to Midtrans Snap payment page
Customer completes payment via chosen method (GoPay, bank transfer, QRIS)
Midtrans sends webhook confirming payment
System updates order status to 'processing'
Customer sees order confirmation page
flows.outcome: Order placed and payment confirmed, customer receives confirmation

flows.title: Customer manages their account
steps: Customer views account dashboard with order summary
Customer can navigate to orders, addresses, or settings
Customer views order history with status
Customer adds or edits shipping addresses
Customer updates profile information
flows.outcome: Customer can view and manage their account data

flows.title: Admin manages products
flows.trigger: Admin navigates to Products section in admin panel
steps: Admin views product list with status and quick actions
Admin clicks 'Add Product' to create new product
Admin fills product details: name, slug, description, price, category, brand, images
Admin adds product variants if applicable
Admin sets product as active/inactive and featured status
System validates and creates product
Storefront pages are revalidated for ISR
flows.outcome: Product created and visible on storefront (if active)

flows.title: Admin processes orders
flows.trigger: Admin navigates to Orders section in admin panel
steps: Admin views order list with filters (status, date, customer)
Admin clicks order to view details
Admin reviews order items, customer info, and payment status
Admin updates order status (processing → shipped → delivered)
System records status change and timestamps
flows.outcome: Order status updated, customer can track progress

flows.title: Admin manages promotions
flows.trigger: Admin navigates to Promotions section in admin panel
steps: Admin views list of promo codes with usage stats
Admin creates new promo code with discount type, value, and conditions
Admin sets minimum order requirement and usage limits
Admin sets validity date range
System validates and creates promotion
flows.outcome: Promo code available for customers at checkout

flows.title: Customer searches for products
flows.trigger: Customer enters search query in search bar
steps: Customer types search query
System performs full-text search on product names and descriptions
System displays matching products in search results page
Customer can filter or sort results
Customer clicks product to view details
flows.outcome: Customer finds desired products via search
